creator: uhclem+nemesis@fw.ast.com
text:
[FDIV013]

When doing FTP download, it asks for the machines fully-qualified domain
name.  I typed:

	dalek.lonestar.org

The next question asked what my domain name was, and it filled the box in
with:

	dalek.lonestar.org|

with the cursor on the right.

Why didn't the install at least delete the left-most field off the
fully-qualified domain name and offer that as a prompt?

Fix: 

*END*
How-To-Repeat: 
Install system and select that you want to do a FTP install.
